content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0836

April 21, 1998

Ken G. Mistler
255 Alderglen Drive
Dixon, California 95620

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. A-98-104

Dear Mr. Mistler:

     This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding your ability to participate in a small business loan program. After reading your advice request and speaking to you on the telephone it is clear that you are seeking advice regarding Government Code Section 1090. The Commission is charged with the implementation and interpretation of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ Government Code Section 1090 is not included in the Act. Therefore, we cannot provide you advice regarding Government Code Section 1090. Please contact the Attorney General's office at 1-800-952-5225 for advice regarding Government Code Section 1090.

     If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Steven G. Churchwell
General Counsel

[signature]

By:    Marte Castaños
       Staff Counsel, Legal Division

SGC:MC:tls

¹ Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 - 18995, of the California Code of Regulations.

l:\Advice Ltra\98104

sections.conclusion: Government Code Section 1090 is not included in the Political Reform Act, and therefore the FPPC cannot provide advice on this matter. The requestor should contact the Attorney General's office at 1-800-952-5225 for guidance on Government Code Section 1090.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestor asked for FPPC advice regarding his ability to participate in a small business loan program, specifically regarding Government Code Section 1090.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide advice because Government Code Section 1090 falls outside the Political Reform Act, which the Commission administers. The requestor was directed to the Attorney General's office for assistance with this matter.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a declination letter with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections marked with headers. The legal question and FPPC's reasoning were extracted from the body text. The document clearly states FPPC lacks jurisdiction over the issue presented.

QUESTION: The requestor asked for FPPC advice regarding his ability to participate in a small business loan program, specifically regarding Government Code Section 1090.

CONCLUSION: Government Code Section 1090 is not included in the Political Reform Act, and therefore the FPPC cannot provide advice on this matter. The requestor should contact the Attorney General's office at 1-800-952-5225 for guidance on Government Code Section 1090.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declined an advice request from Ken G. Mistier regarding Government Code Section 1090 and small business loan program participation, as Section 1090 is not within the Political Reform Act's scope. The requestor was referred to the Attorney General's office for appropriate guidance.
